name: Original Canadian Tourtiere
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Place pork, veal, onion, and water in a saucepan. Simmer until color changes.
3. Add seasonings; simmer for a little longer.
4. Thoroughly drain the meat.
5. Mix in mashed potatoes.
6. Fit bottom pastry into an 8-inch pie plate.
7. Fill with meat mixture.
8. Cover with top crust. Seal edges as desired and vent top to allow steam to escape.
9. Bake at 425°F for 10 minutes, then lower oven temperature to 400°F and bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until crust is golden brown and filling is hot.
10. Serves 6. Note: If you prefer a spicier tourtiere, increase seasonings to your taste.
